title: mangifera linearifolia
intro: Mangifera linearifolia is a plant species belonging to the family Anacardiaceae, commonly known as the mango family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in traditional medicine. The health benefits associated with Mangifera linearifolia include the potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bark are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that are said to offer these benefits.
